name: Serabi Gold plc
description: Serabi Gold plc is a gold producer and developer operating in the Tapajos region of Para State in northern Brazil, with its flagship Palito Mining Complex fully operational since 2003. The company also holds the Coringa Gold Project, also in Para State, which is at the development stage with significant resource potential. Serabi Gold is listed on the TSX (SBI) and London Stock Exchange AIM (SRB), generating approximately $94 million in annual revenue as of 2024.
